title: catharanthus lanceus
intro: Catharanthus lanceus, also known as the Madagascar periwinkle, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Madagascar. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly the alkaloids vinblastine and vincristine, which have been used to treat various types of cancer and other diseases. In addition to its medicinal uses, the plant has been found to have various health benefits, including lowering blood sugar levels and reducing inflammation. The leaves and flowers of the plant are commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to promote wound healing and reduce fever.
